_core_paths_doc: BLUE crates per CLAUDE.md. ade_runtime is RED (shell); ade_testkit and ade_node are neither. ade_network has per-submodule BLUE scoping: mux::frame is BLUE; mux::transport and session are RED. ade_core::consensus (S-B1 onward) is BLUE under the already-listed crate prefix. Substring matches against absolute file paths.
_replay_cmd_doc: ade_testkit hosts boundary_replay, differential_*_replay, ledger_determinism, and stateful_replay test suites.
_replay_on_stop_doc: Disabled by default. Phase 4 test runtime is acceptable but full replay across all eras is not sub-second; flip to true once selective replay is introduced.
_clusters_dir_doc: Canonical IDD location. Currently contains PHASE4-N-D (in-flight). Closed Phase 0A/0B/1/2A/2C clusters remain at docs/completed/phase_*/ as historical anchors.
_cluster_id_format_doc: Cluster IDs use the PHASE<N>-<LETTER> convention (e.g., PHASE4-N-A, PHASE4-N-D). Slash commands pass the cluster id as the literal directory name under docs/clusters/.
_clusters_archive_dir_doc: Where /cluster-close moves cluster docs upon closure. Created on demand.
_planning_doc_doc: Active phase plan. /cluster-doc reads this when seeding new cluster docs (N-A, N-B, N-C, N-E, N-F).
_grounding_docs_dir_doc: Where the four grounding docs live: ade-CODEMAP.md, ade-SEAMS.md, ade-HEAD_DELTAS.md, ade-TRACEABILITY.md.
_head_deltas_baseline_doc: MEM-OPT-UTXO-DISK CLOSE baseline (close commit 470f9b89, 2026-06-17; pushed to origin/main). The storage-backed UTxO memory-authority cluster: moved the UTxO off the anonymous heap and flipped OP-MEM-02 declared->enforced, SCOPED to the live track_utxo=false admission path (owned RssAnon 1.94 GiB < Haskell 2.57 GiB, ade_below; ~58% below the 4.59 GiB pre-cluster baseline). The win is PATH A -- StaticUtxoFp (constant UTxO-component fingerprint computed once at bootstrap, fail-closed under track_utxo=true / version-mismatch) + dropping the in-memory 1.9M-entry static UTxO after the existing snapshot is durable. The on-disk redb backend (UtxoAnchor / WorkingSet / pre-resolve / fixed-width key) is built + unit-proven but DORMANT -- preparation for B (LIVE-LEDGER-APPLY / track_utxo=true), NOT the BA-08 mechanism. DC-MEM-09 (owned utxo_lookup) + DC-MEM-10 (versioned incremental v2 fingerprint) enforced; DC-MEM-07 partial; DC-MEM-05 (backend-independent replay, declared) + DC-MEM-06 (partial) still gate the dormant on-disk backend. UNLIKE MEM-OPT-OPS this cluster TOUCHED BLUE (~18 files, +1537/-72) but proven behavior-invariant EXCEPT the deliberate Ade-internal versioned v1->v2 fingerprint cutover (fingerprint() delegates to fingerprint_v2; v1 FROZEN; store FINGERPRINT_VERSION=2 fail-closed on opening an old store; never peer-facing). +1 crate (11->12): ade_mem_diag, the RED unsafe-mi_collect quarantine (ade_node keeps deny(unsafe_code) with zero local allows). Grounding docs were regenerated at content-HEAD 1b851c07 (the close commit 470f9b89 adds them): 12 crates / 471 canonical types (+7 BLUE) / 2640 tests / 200 CI (+10) / 380 rules (253 enforced / 23 partial / 103 declared / 1 enforced_scaffolding). OWED enforcement debt (NOT erased by this baseline bump): 6 of the 10 new CI gates -- the dormant B-infra + S0 diagnostic gates (ci_check_utxo_disk_anchor, ci_check_utxo_disk_key, ci_check_utxo_pre_resolve, ci_check_utxo_admission_seam, ci_check_mem_diag_quarantine, ci_check_mem_opt_utxo_disk_s0) -- are not yet bound to a registry rule; they attach to DC-MEM-05/06 when B (track_utxo=true) lands. Also OWED: the 10-day sustained BA-08 certification run. Prior baseline 862cd2cb (PHASE4-N-AO close); span 862cd2cb..1b851c07 is documented in docs/ade-HEAD_DELTAS.md, and the next cluster's HEAD_DELTAS regenerates from this 470f9b89 baseline. See docs/ade-HEAD_DELTAS.md.
_normative_docs_doc: Files /traceability reads to extract rules. Tier-gate statement and its Tier 5 addendum carry the most enforced rules; the contract docs anchor cross-surface invariants; CLAUDE.md carries the commit-attribution policy.
_canonical_type_registry_doc: No separate canonical-type registry file yet; canonical-type rules live inline in the invariant registry under family T.
_invariant_registry_doc: Canonical, append-only invariant registry. Schema follows ziranity-v3's constitution_rule_registry.toml (base fields identical), additively compatible with the IDD template. 359 entries at HEAD (225 enforced / 19 partial / 114 declared / 1 enforced_scaffolding / 0 deprecated) across families T (true), CN (constraint network), DC (derived constraint), OP (operational), RO (release obligation). Recent additions through PHASE4-N-AI: DC-NODE-23..29 (live single-best-peer rollback-follow wiring -- venue-blind detector + venue-split resolver, live durable apply, rollback+reselection replay-equivalence via the WalEntry::RollBack marker, no-forge-across-pending-reselection, canonical rollback-target slot/hash binding; ALL ENFORCED) + CN-CONS-01 partial->enforced (arrival-order-independence permutation proof over select_best_chain); CN-CONS-03 NOT flipped (broad multi-node convergence -- strengthened only, single-best-peer scope, CE-AI-6 operator-gated/vacuous-until-committed); 11 strengthenings (DC-PUMP-01 / DC-NODE-05/12/20 / DC-CONS-20 / CN-STORE-07 / DC-CONS-03/05/06 / T-REC-03/05); +2 BLUE types (RollbackPoint/RollbackReason). Per-cluster security review caught HIGH H-1 (rollback target built from peer slot + locally-verified hash) -> AI-S6 DC-NODE-29 pre-commit canonical binding; re-review H-1 CLOSED. Prior through PHASE4-N-AH: DC-NODE-20 (local selected durable chain forge-base authority -- forge base = local durable ChainDb::tip under the 6-condition observed-feed fence, never followed_peer_tip or the operator adoption cert; ENFORCED) + DC-NODE-21 (adoption cert evidence-only -- VenueAdoptionCertificate/read_adoption_cert/parse_hex32/--adoption-cert-path fully removed from ade_node; ENFORCED) + DC-NODE-22 (single-producer warm-start re-entry from the recovered own-spine tip above the replay anchor; ENFORCED) + DC-NODE-19 (single-producer loop-continuation-after-feed-EOF; DECLARED from PHASE4-N-AG, live CE re-homed to N-AH CE-AH-6, not overclaimed as independent live architecture) + 9 strengthenings (strengthened_in += PHASE4-N-AH on DC-NODE-05/12/15/18/19 + T-REC-03/05 + CN-NODE-02/04; DC-CONS-03 explicitly untouched). Live: run-4 CE-AH-6 -- cert-free single-producer block production on C2-LOCAL vs a real cardano-node 11.0.1 relay, NOT preprod. Prior through PHASE4-N-AE.F (enforced): DC-NODE-16 (receive idempotency at the durable-admit chokepoint -- a peer-delivered block already durably present byte-identically in the ChainDb, same slot AND same hash, is an idempotent no-op at pump_block: no validation step, no WAL append, no tip change, replay-equivalent; a DIFFERENT block, different hash, at/before the last-applied slot is NOT short-circuited and reaches the unchanged BLUE header authority and fails closed; gated on HASH equality vs the durable store, never slot alone; closes the post-CE-A5 echo where the relay re-announced Ade's own adopted tip and the BLUE authority rejected SlotBeforeLastApplied, ending an otherwise-successful continuous run with exit 43 AFTER AddedToCurrentChain; RED chokepoint only, NO BLUE change). Prior through PHASE4-N-AE (enforced): DC-NODE-14 (recovered/forge-parent FindIntersect-only intersectability) + DC-NODE-15 (forge admissibility = durable servable tip == followed peer tip) + DC-CONS-24 (forged parent hash byte-equals the peer-visible tip) + DC-PROTO-10 (chain-sync server FindIntersect cursor -- the CE-A5 manifest closer) + 9 strengthenings (incl. CN-CONS-06 first live cross-impl acceptance, DC-WAL-02/T-REC-05 recover->follow continuity). The CE-A5 manifest: a real cardano-node 11.0.1 relay AddedToCurrentChain an Ade-forged block. Prior through PHASE4-N-AC (enforced): DC-CRYPTO-10 (the RED producer signing shell evolves the operator KES key forward to the requested KES period before signing -- kes_sign_header_advancing = kes_advance_to(period) then kes_sign_header, reusing the existing deterministic Sum6KES update; fail-closed EvolutionBackwards backwards / EvolutionExhausted beyond the key lifetime; the forge's single real KES sign is rewired to it so the forge works across KES periods, not just the minted period 0) + strengthening CN-KES-HEADER-01 (the header KES signature is over the canonical unsigned-header pre-image AND is now signed with the key evolved to the block's KES period). Prior through PHASE4-N-AB (enforced): CN-SESS-05 (outbound mux segmentation -- the GREEN session reducer segments outbound mini-protocol payloads > MAX_PAYLOAD into ordered <=MAX_PAYLOAD mux frames via the single encode_inner_frame authority and fails closed above the fixed non-configurable MAX_OUTBOUND_PAYLOAD_BYTES = 16 MiB; the outbound inverse of CN-SESS-04 inbound reassembly, so Ade can SERVE a >64 KB block) + strengthenings CN-SESS-04 + DC-SERVEMEM-01 (inbound reassembly now has a symmetric outbound segmentation; the bounded peer-driven serve range can now transmit large blocks within the bound). Prior through PHASE4-N-AA (enforced): DC-SERVEMEM-01 (bounded peer-driven serve range -- the --mode node serve caps each peer request at MAX_SERVE_RANGE_BLOCKS=256 via hash-free bounded ChainDb primitives + fail-closed; closes the PHASE4-N-U cross-slice security MEDIUM; serve-side analog of DC-LIVEMEM-01) + strengthenings DC-NODE-13 + DC-LIVEMEM-01 (durable-chain serve projection now bounded; receive-side bound now symmetric on the serve side). Prior through PHASE4-N-U (all enforced): DC-NODE-12 + DC-CONS-23 + DC-WAL-04 + T-REC-05 + DC-NODE-13 (forged-block durability -- own-forged durable admit via pump_block, forged-tip warm-start forward-replay recovery, serve-as-durable-chain projection) + strengthenings CN-CONS-07 + DC-NODE-11 (serve-provenance / monotone-gate superseded). Prior through PHASE4-N-F-G-R: DC-NODE-09 (G-K, serve-listener lifetime), CN-WIRE-10 (G-L, serve-side N2N handshake V15 cardano-node compat -- live-confirmed), CN-WIRE-11 (G-M, real-node ChainSync FindIntersect + ArrayHead), T-REC-04 + DC-CINPUT-03 (G-N, WarmStart eta0 seed-epoch sidecar), CN-WIRE-12 (G-O, feed-side BlockFetch tag-24 unwrap), DC-CINPUT-04 (G-P, feed header-validation view), DC-NODE-10 (G-Q, forge-successor evolved-spine position), DC-NODE-11 (G-R, monotone served-chain stability gate).
_ci_dirs_doc: CI scripts live as `ci/ci_check_*.sh` (ci_dirs = ["ci"]). A non-gating .github/workflows/notify-atlas.yml dispatch workflow also exists (grounding-doc -> ade-atlas rebuild trigger), but it is not an Ade invariant gate; add '.github/workflows' to ci_dirs only if/when an actual invariant gate is added there.
